# GitHub Copilot Instructions for Family OS

Follow the repository guidance in AGENTS.md and docs/ai/AI_CONTEXT.md.

Prioritize:
- Reusable React components
- TypeScript correctness
- Responsive UI
- Supabase-safe database patterns
- Clear naming
- Minimal dependencies
- Consistent design system usage

Avoid:
- Large unstructured components
- Duplicated logic
- Hardcoded data that should live in Supabase
- Unapproved architectural changes
